title: Craftable Totem of Undying
description: Adds a crafting recipe for the Totem of Undying!
body:
[![Requires Fabric API](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![Requires Quilted Fabric API](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/requires/quilted-fabric-api_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)

![Craftable Totem of Undying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd3ab1df4007cba934b2fc2dfa57641f15c02e0c.png)

This mod/datapack adds a crafting recipe for the Totem of Undying! No need to find a woodland mansion and hunt down evokers just to get a Totem of Undying.

## Recipe
![You can craft a totem of undying using 1 gold block, 2 emeralds, and 4 gold ingots.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a070deebd97c438a05f4d6e255bb8128543044c3.png)

Check out my other mods [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Sumbaii999).
